ms.description: Wall-clock duration the producer took to compute the response, milliseconds.

inputTokens.description: Input (prompt) tokens consumed while computing the response.

outputTokens.description: Output (completion) tokens produced while computing the response.

cacheReadTokens.description: Prompt-cache read tokens served while computing the response.

description:
Shared `_perf` block for every S-series response envelope (#63/#64).

Carries coarse performance telemetry for the response: wall-clock `ms` and the
token accounting the producer measured. All counters are int32 (not int64) to
avoid JSON Schema string coercion.
